trigger: implementing Django Ninja v2 API with Response Protocol from SPEC-NINJA-API-RESPONSE-PROTOCOL.md
reconciling spec field names with actual model fields (Object.body vs content, capture_method vs source_adapter, Tension M2M vs direct FKs)
creating Pydantic schemas for Response Protocol (30+ ninja.Schema classes)
adding utility_count IntegerField to Edge model, creating migration 0044

description: batch 5 count queries into single raw SQL with subselects instead of 5 ORM .count() calls
merge edges_out + edges_in queries into single Q(from_object=obj) | Q(to_object=obj) query
use bulk_create for provenance edges instead of individual Edge.objects.create in loop
eliminate duplicate assemble_evidence() call by hoisting arg_graph computation before L2/L3
skip compose_with_reasoning fallback when reasoning_result is None to avoid redundant retrieval
use model enum constants (Tension.Status.OPEN, Tension.TensionType.CLAIM_CONFLICT) instead of string literals
use Model._meta.db_table instead of hardcoded table names in raw SQL
remove dead retrieved_objects and tensions parameters from generate_narrative
Django Ninja v2 can coexist with DRF v1 on the same project by mounting at /api/v2/ without conflicting with existing /api/v1/ DRF router
When spec assumes direct FK fields on a model but reality uses M2M, map through M2M.values_list in the service layer rather than adding redundant FK fields
ConnectionFeedback should be created via the from_object/to_object pair from the Edge, not by passing the edge itself as FK, because the model stores the object pair not the edge reference
Batch multiple COUNT queries into a single raw SQL with subselects when the endpoint is called on every page load (graph-weather pattern)
When a compose/expression function has a fallback path that triggers full retrieval, skip it if pre-retrieved objects are available to avoid redundant DB+vector round-trips
Use Model._meta.db_table in raw SQL instead of hardcoding table names to survive app_label changes
